title: Stupendous Visuals
description: This project aims to make the textures of Minecraft more vibrant! While also aiming to achieve compatibility with popular mods
body:
_made with plenty of assistance from Soulkan and elisio_! 

**This project aims to make the textures of Minecraft more vibrant! While also aiming to achieve compatibility with popular mods MAINLY for version 1.20.1. But future versions are accounted for to a degree.**


### [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone), [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) are needed for this pack to work.

> My current goal is to make things look more colorful, and give things a little makeover. This pack is mostly for fun, so I will be updating it at my own convenience. Expect certain things to look different for every version!
> I made sure to make every texture as distinct as possible, without losing the original vision. I also like to animate some items. **Since it's in the early stages, I might have missed some things. With a bit of time and love, I can make this better and better!**

enderverse's top 25+ resource packs has this texturepack on there the first one holy moly

## **CURRENT COMPATABILITIES INCLUDE:** 
(some may be a work in progress)
- Alex's Mobs
- Cobblemon
- No Man's Land
- Overflowing Bars
- Appleskin
- Cosmetic Armor Reworked
- Aether
- Alex's Caves
- Mowzies Mobs
- Biomes O' Plenty
- [Let's Do] Blooming Nature
- Farmer's Delight
- Regions Unexplored
- Terramity
- More Critters
- Terralith
- Oh The Biomes We've Gone
- Lootr
- Species
- Tough As Nails
- Create
- Primal
- Spawn
- Species

Currently working on overhauling, and adding new compatibilities!

**CURRENT KNOWN INCOMPATIBILITIES INCLUDE:**
- Oculus (SOMETIMES messes with the cow model..? )
- Iris (same reason above)

If you're having issues with recolors like birch and water, hit F3 + T to reload your resource packs.
